summary: Initial testing of SwarmOps multi-agent system completed. Frontend UI loads successfully with all 5 agent status cards and navigation working. Critical backend issues found: LLM API budget exceeded and MongoDB ObjectId serialization errors preventing all POST operations (content generation, file uploads, event creation). All GET endpoints working correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: 500 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization - 'ObjectId' object is not iterable
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all create/upload operations across all 5 agents

critical_bugs.issue: LLM Budget exceeded: Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.002515, Max budget: 0.001

working_endpoints.status: All 5 agents properly registered: content, email, scheduler, budget, volunteer
All GET endpoints for histories/lists working correctly

integration_issues.issue: Backend API failures prevent testing of full integration workflow

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with 5 agent status cards correctly
Swarm status display shows all agent names and status indicators
Navigation between dashboard and individual agent pages via sidebar icons works
Content Agent page loads with proper form inputs and buttons
Backend health endpoint returns all 5 agents correctly
All GET endpoints for agent histories working
UI design matches dark command center theme with gold accents
Event ID display shows current event (event_demo_001)

critical_fixes_needed: Fix MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue - use UUIDs instead of ObjectIds or properly exclude _id fields from responses
Replace or update SWARMOPS_LLM_KEY - current key budget exceeded (max: 0.001, current: 0.002515)
Verify all POST endpoints work after ObjectId fix by testing event creation and content generation
verification_steps: Test file upload functionality for Email and Volunteer agents
Test schedule creation and budget tracking
Verify inter-agent handoffs and activity logging work correctly

success_percentage.backend: 35% - Health check and GET endpoints working, all POST endpoints failing
success_percentage.frontend: 85% - UI loads correctly, navigation works, but backend integration blocked by API failures
success_percentage.overall: 60% - Core UI functional but backend operations non-functional
